stateDiagram-v2
  %% Order flow
  classDef terminal fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px;
  state "Cancelled" as n_73746174652D63616E63656C6C6564
  state "Created" as n_73746174652D63726561746564
  state "Paid" as n_73746174652D70616964
  state "Shipped" as n_73746174652D73686970706564
  n_73746174652D63726561746564 --> n_73746174652D63616E63656C6C6564 : Cancel
  n_73746174652D63726561746564 --> n_73746174652D70616964 : Pay
  n_73746174652D70616964 --> n_73746174652D63616E63656C6C6564 : Cancel
  n_73746174652D70616964 --> n_73746174652D73686970706564 : Ship
  class n_73746174652D63616E63656C6C6564 terminal
  class n_73746174652D73686970706564 terminal
